## Recent User Messages

- `2026-05-31T19:13:24.068Z` lets think this feature and the other aspects associated with it. how are we handling the stop loss rules/line once the trailing stop has kicked in/taken over? please make sure you account for all aspects of our app touching this.
- `2026-05-31T19:59:03.689Z` i want to make our stop loss and trailing stop lines more visible on the chart. lets think this through and plan it out
- `2026-05-31T20:05:25.441Z` it looks like the settings in our Pyrus algo settings are not properly acting on the chart. please investigate
- `2026-05-31T20:32:34.974Z` lets find our last session on implemeneting greeks in our contract selection process
- `2026-05-31T20:34:40.371Z` okay lets refresh where we were with all this work
- `2026-05-31T20:58:02.940Z` lets do some research on how we can use the various greeks to help us pick the contract that has the best expectancy when a signal is received (i.e. which strike, which expiration, how we can avoid contracts we deem to be "overpriced", and more). this will be intensive. we should be updating our latest trading analysis or strategy doc as we work
- `2026-05-31T21:11:13.587Z` lets analyze the plan here and start building it into a strategy.
- `2026-05-31T21:18:54.303Z` this sounds good. how we can run a small test on fridays trading? can we get historical greeks for this test?
- `2026-05-31T21:23:30.104Z` okay go ahead
- `2026-05-31T21:26:09.859Z` no need to label as historical. this is just going to be a formatted markdown file of the results
- `2026-05-31T21:26:42.393Z` Implement the plan.
- `2026-05-31T21:36:14.911Z` data:image/png;base64,


## Validations Detected In Transcript

- None detected in this session transcript.

## What Changed This Session

- Confirmed the chart-local Pyrus Signals settings were disconnected from the active Pyrus Algo profile settings.
- Added shared chart settings helpers in `chartIndicatorPersistence.js` to derive Pyrus Signals chart defaults from Algo/profile settings and preserve chart-local overrides.
- Wired active `useGetSignalMonitorProfile` data into Trade screen chart consumers, then synced Pyrus Signals runtime knobs and chart timeframe into both equity and option chart panels.
- Wired selected Backtesting study parameters through the same shared helper so backtest chart Pyrus Signals settings follow the study Algo parameters.
- Added TypeScript declarations for the JS chart persistence helper so TS backtesting code can import the shared sync functions without suppressions.
- Added regression coverage for default sync, override preservation, profile updates, Trade source wiring, Backtesting source wiring, and Shadow automation chart risk-line recomputation from Algo exit settings.

## Current Status

- Implementation is complete for Algo/profile Pyrus Signals settings affecting Trade equity charts, Trade option charts, and selected Backtesting study charts.
- Chart-local user overrides are intentionally preserved unless the chart value is still the default or still matches the previously synced Algo value.
- Shadow chart risk-line regression verifies Algo exit settings drive stop/trailing overlay values and active trailing-stop takeover state.
- Focused charting, Trade source, Backtesting source, Shadow API, API typecheck, Pyrus typecheck, and diff-check validations pass.
- Full `platformRootSource.test.js` was attempted and still has unrelated pre-existing source-contract failures outside this change; the focused touched assertion passes.
- Workspace also contains unrelated dirty changes in `artifacts/pyrus/scripts/runUnitTests.mjs` and `artifacts/pyrus/src/features/signals/`; they were left untouched.
- No live browser visual verification was run in this turn.

## Next Recommended Steps

1. Browser-dogfood Trade charts with `?pyrusQa=safe` and an active Pyrus Algo profile to confirm the visible chart settings and timeframe follow the Algo profile until locally overridden.
2. Browser-dogfood Backtesting selected studies to confirm Pyrus Signals overlays reflect the selected study parameters.
3. Triage the unrelated full `platformRootSource.test.js` source-contract failures separately.
